'''radate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:omnipresently|omnipresently]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-d-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:omnipresently|omnipresently]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| radate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:radate|radate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:radatesher|radatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:radatesherĂ«m|radatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:radatero|radatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:radateshĂ«|radateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:radateshĂ«m|radateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiradatero|gokiradatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiradateshĂ«|gokiradateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiradateshĂ«m|gokiradateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goradankerom|goradankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goradankeshĂ«|goradankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goradankeshĂ«m|goradankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goradankeya|goradankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:radaterom|radaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:radatemu|radatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:radateya|radateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiradaterom|gokiradaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiradatemu|gokiradatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiradateya|gokiradateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:radadate|radadate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:radadatesher|radadatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:radadatesherĂ«m|radadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:radadatero|radadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:radadateshĂ«|radadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:radadateshĂ«m|radadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiradadatero|gokiradadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiradadateshĂ«|gokiradadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiradadateshĂ«m|gokiradadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goradadankerom|goradadankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goradadankeshĂ«|goradadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goradadankeshĂ«m|goradadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goradadankeya|goradadankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:radadaterom|radadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:radadatemu|radadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:radadateya|radadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiradadaterom|gokiradadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiradadatemu|gokiradadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiradadateya|gokiradadateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:rĂŠdĂŠte|rĂŠdĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rĂŠdĂŠtesher|rĂŠdĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m|rĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠdĂŠtero|rĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|rĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|rĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠdĂŠtero|gokirĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|gokirĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|gokirĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorĂŠdĂŠnkerom|gorĂŠdĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«|gorĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gorĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorĂŠdĂŠnkeya|gorĂŠdĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠdĂŠterom|rĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠdĂŠtemu|rĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rĂŠdĂŠteya|rĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠdĂŠtemu|gokirĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirĂŠdĂŠteya|gokirĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:rafdafte|rafdafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rafdaftesher|rafdaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafdaftesherĂ«m|rafdaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafdaftero|rafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rafdafteshĂ«|rafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafdafteshĂ«m|rafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafdaftero|gokirafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirafdafteshĂ«|gokirafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafdafteshĂ«m|gokirafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorafdafnkerom|gorafdafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorafdafnkeshĂ«|gorafdafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorafdafnkeshĂ«m|gorafdafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorafdafnkeya|gorafdafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafdafterom|rafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafdaftemu|rafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rafdafteya|rafdafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafdafterom|gokirafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafdaftemu|gokirafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirafdafteya|gokirafdafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
